source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/05_HnX-P1, HnX-PB/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/블루투스 모듈 성적서/BoT-nLE521+DOC_RED+with+RoHS_NEW.pdf

document.title: EC-Declaration of conformity for BLE Module BoT-nLE521

sourceSummary.oneLine: CHIPSEN Co., Ltd. declares BLE Module BoT-nLE521 conformity with RED 2014/53/EU and RoHS 2011/65/EU.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Declaration of conformity and supporting standards/test report traceability for the BLE Module BoT-nLE521.
keyPoints: Product kind is stated as BLE Module.
Declaration follows RED RADIO EQUIPMENT DIRECTIVE 2014/53/EU and RoHS DIRECTIVE 2011/65/EU.
Detailed specification is shown in RED Test Report ICRT-TR-E210586-0A, KILT2102-U01522 and RoHS Test Report RE-P-210223-1-013.

concepts.name: EC-Declaration of conformity
concepts.evidence: This EC-Declaration of conformity is following the provisions of RED RADIO EQUIPMENT DIRECTIVE 2014/53/EU, RoHS DIRECTIVE 2011/65/EU.

evidence.claim: The declaring company is CHIPSEN Co., Ltd.
The equipment kind is BLE Module.
The EC-Declaration of conformity follows RED 2014/53/EU and RoHS 2011/65/EU.
evidence.evidenceText: This EC-Declaration of conformity is following the provisions of RED RADIO EQUIPMENT DIRECTIVE 2014/53/EU, RoHS DIRECTIVE 2011/65/EU.

evidence.claim: A sample of the product was tested and found in conformity with listed standards.
evidence.evidenceText: It is confirmed that a sample of the product has been tested and found in conformity with below standard(s):

evidence.claim: The declaration lists RED Test Report ICRT-TR-E210586-0A, KILT2102-U01522.
The declaration lists RoHS Test Report RE-P-210223-1-013.
